scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @alibi/game-core && npm run build --workspace @alibi/api && npm run build --workspace @alibi/player-web && npm run build --workspace @alibi/admin-web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @alibi/game-core && concurrently -k -n api,player,admin "npm run dev --workspace @alibi/api" "npm run dev --workspace @alibi/player-web" "npm run dev --workspace @alibi/admin-web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @alibi/game-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @alibi/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @alibi/player-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @alibi/admin-web
